title: cyrtandra calpidicarpa
intro: Cyrtandra calpidicarpa, also known as a species of the Cyrtandra genus, is a plant that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Cyrtandra calpidicarpa include reducing fever, treating malaria, and soothing skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
